summary: EXP-293 closes WIN-064.c5 Hole #2 (citation verifiability gap for two V51-era dome quotes in WIN-064 detail_extra). Proposes (1) commit new raw-text/02b-wins-V51-win064.txt verbatim capture (2026-05-08, MD5 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0, matches poller-corroborated 34-consecutive-poll byte-identical hash) and (2) annotation insertion in WIN-064 detail_extra with archive cite. Wayback Option (a) verified unavailable (archive.org returned zero snapshots). Out-of-scope follow-ups noted: full V51 wins archive + poller auto-snapshot infrastructure.
